question: Quelles tendances visuelles suivre (2026) : borders, elevation, coins arrondis ?

principles.text: Convergence M3 + Apple HIG : tonal elevation (surface teintee plutot que drop shadows lourdes), subtle borders (1px, 6% opacity), glassmorphism subtil (blur 20px), coins arrondis 8-16px.
sources: Material Design 3 — tonal elevation, shape system (niv. 5)
Apple HIG 2025 — materials, vibrancy, corner radius (niv. 5)
